arts.ttl: Cheltenham Town prospects earn professional contracts
arts.sum: Tall central defender Walters became the Robins' youngest ever first team player when he started against West Ham United Under-21s in the EFL Trophy on October 18, 2022, aged 16 years and nine days. Cheltenham Town are set to offer professional contracts to youth team prospects Cameron Walters and Harry Tustin.

Cheltenham's 3-2 win over Crewe at the weekend ended their four defeats on the trot and was their first win in five games. Gillingham's 1-0 win over MK Dons at the weekend was their first win in six ...
